nav.feedbackProviderSub: What would make managing your listings easier?
nav.feedbackParentSub: Tell us what would help you find the right activities for your kids.

landing.sub: Browse local sports, arts, music, coding and more — then request a trial session with any provider.
landing.providerSub: List your activity, set your schedule and pricing, and receive trial session requests directly from interested parents in Timișoara.
landing.benefitInbox: Trial requests straight to your inbox
landing.step1Desc: Search by category, age range, or neighborhood. Every active listing in Timișoara, in one place.
landing.step2Desc: Most providers offer a free first session. Request one directly — no payment, no commitment, just show up.
landing.step3Desc: Loved it? Enroll directly with the provider. All contracts and payments are between you and them.
